form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at Southwell All Weather September 27 over 2400m, 11 len behind Phrygia with 60kg at $17. On debut fifth of 11 at Newcastle All Weather June 27 over 1400m, 8 len behind Excellent Believe with 59kg at $51. Hard to recommend.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of four-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation eighth of 10 at Southwell All Weather November 21 over 1600m, 12 len behind Bin Ajwad with 54.5kg at $81. When resuming last campaign fifth of 9 at Haydock Park April 26 over 2000m, 1.5 len behind Salamanca City with 57kg at $13. Certainly one to consider.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 7th of 11 at Newcastle All Weather on March 21 over 1600m, 4 len behind Barry's Boy with 59kg at $19. Previously second-up came from midfield and won by a head at Doncaster April 25 over 1600m defeating Seed Investor with 58.5kg at $7. Has won second up before but looks tested again.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of nine weeks. Finished off last preparation seventh of 11 at Southwell All Weather February 5 over 1600m, 5 len behind Aisling Oscar carrying 60kg at $7. First up last campaign sixth of 14 at York May 14 over 1400m, 2 len behind Rare Change with 56kg at $15. In the right race and sure to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run half a furlong out.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 3rd of 8 at Wolverhampton on March 2 over 1700m, 0.8 len behind Serious Look with 57.5kg at $8. Second run from a spell 5th of 12 at Lingfield All Weather on March 27 over 2000m, 3 len behind Latin with 70kg at $5.50. Certainly worth another chance.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. First up last campaign ran last of 11 at Carlisle July 5 over 1570m, soft track; 22 len behind Sheriff's Court carrying 59kg at $17. Solid top-three proposition.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run favourite; won by a nose at Newcastle All Weather March 27 over 1600m defeating Alpine Sierra carrying 58kg at $5. The start before that 2nd of 9 at Southwell All Weather on March 13 over 1600m, 0.5 len behind Marry The Night carrying 59.5kg at $5.50. Can go on with it with the confidence high.
